nasb.text: As for the builders, each wore his sword girded at his side as he built, while the trumpeter stood near me.

esv.text: And each of the builders had his sword strapped at his side while he built. The man who sounded the trumpet was beside me.

cnv.text: 建造的人，都腰間佩著刀來建造；吹號角的人在我旁邊。

ccb.text: 修筑城墙的人工作的时候都腰间配剑。吹号的人在我旁边，
